ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tenders" (
  "tender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tender */,
  "tender_location" TEXT /* Location where the tender is published (e.g., Namibia) */,
  "tender_sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector of the tender */,
  "tender_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the tender requirements */,
  "tender_date" TEXT /* Date when the tender was published */,
  "tender_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for submitting bids */,
  "tender_status" TEXT /* Current status of the tender (e.g., open, closed, awarded) */,
  "tender_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tender officer responsible for the tender */,
  "tender_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the tender */,
  "tender_contract_period" TEXT /* Duration of the contract */,
  "tender_procurement_method" TEXT /* Method of procurement (e.g., open tender, restricted tender) */,
  "tender_category" TEXT /* Category of the tender (e.g., goods, services, works) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tenders_tender_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("tender_sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tenders_tender_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("tender_officer_id") REFERENCES tender_officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Services, Environment and Pollution) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tender_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tender officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the tender officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the tender officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the tender officer belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the tender officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bidders" (
  "bidder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bidder */,
  "bidder_name" TEXT /* Full name of the bidder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the bidder */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company the bidder represents */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the bidder */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the bidder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bidder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bids" (
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bid */,
  "tender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tender the bid is submitted for */,
  "bidder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bidder submitting the bid */,
  "bid_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bid */,
  "bid_date" TEXT /* Date the bid was submitted */,
  "bid_status" TEXT /* Status of the bid (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "bid_submission_method" TEXT /* Method of bid submission (e.g., online, offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_bidder_id FOREIGN KEY ("bidder_id") REFERENCES bidders ("bidder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_tender_id FOREIGN KEY ("tender_id") REFERENCES tenders ("tender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bid_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bid document */,
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bid the document is attached to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., bid form, technical proposal) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bid_documents_bid_id FOREIGN KEY ("bid_id") REFERENCES bids ("bid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tender_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tender document */,
  "tender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tender the document is attached to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., tender notice, evaluation criteria) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tender_documents_tender_id FOREIGN KEY ("tender_id") REFERENCES tenders ("tender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "tender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tender the question is about */,
  "bidder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bidder asking the question */,
  "question" TEXT /* Question text */,
  "ask_date" TEXT /* Date the question was asked */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer to the question */,
  "answer_date" TEXT /* Date the answer was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_tender_id FOREIGN KEY ("tender_id") REFERENCES tenders ("tender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_bidder_id FOREIGN KEY ("bidder_id") REFERENCES bidders ("bidder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bid being evaluated */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was conducted */,
  "technical_score" INTEGER /* Technical score given by the evaluator */,
  "financial_score" INTEGER /* Financial score given by the evaluator */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_bid_id FOREIGN KEY ("bid_id") REFERENCES bids ("bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluators" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluator */,
  "evaluator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the evaluator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the evaluator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the evaluator belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tender_amendments" (
  "amendment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amendment */,
  "tender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tender being amended */,
  "amendment_date" TEXT /* Date the amendment was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amendment */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the amendment document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amendment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tender_amendments_tender_id FOREIGN KEY ("tender_id") REFERENCES tenders ("tender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tender_cancellations" (
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation */,
  "tender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tender being cancelled */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date the cancellation was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tender_cancellations_tender_id FOREIGN KEY ("tender_id") REFERENCES tenders ("tender_id")
)
